@31086 / NON-LIT DIRECTIONAL: Furnish and apply "ITM" vinyl to single sided non-lit directional sign. Reference Eagle sketch 0121-31086-00.

@31087 / DRIVE THRU CANOPY: Remove and dispose of current LED OPEN sign. Fabricate and install (2) new LED illuminated signs "ATM" and "ITM". Reference Eagle sketch 0121-31087-00. NOTE: ELECTRICAL CIRCUITS TO THESE SIGNS BY OTHERS.
